heading: Sources of Data Transfer Costs
body:
Atlas data transfer costs depend on the cloud service provider
hosting your cluster. Atlas tabulates data transfer
costs daily.

Atlas charges for data transfer between your Atlas node
and another node. The following transfers incur costs, listed in order
of lowest cost to highest:

- Data transfer using in-region VNet peering.

- Data transfer to a different region. Data transfer charges for an Atlas
  cluster depend on the geographic location of the source node.

- Data transfer using cross-region VNet peering.
